libraries_sheet.ui:help: CSV with one row per (pool x library). Columns: run_id, fastq_id, library_type. See pipeline README for format and examples.

samples_sheet.ui:help: CSV with one row per demultiplexed sample. Columns: run_id, sample_id, hashtag_ids (pipe-separated for multi-tag samples). See pipeline README.

feature_reference.ui:help: 10x feature reference CSV. HTO rows MUST use feature_type='Multiplexing Capture' (used by cellranger for sample demux); CITE-seq antibodies MUST use feature_type='Antibody Capture'. See pipeline README.

gex_reference_url.ui:help: URL or s3:// URI to a 10x GEX reference tarball. Default is human GRCh38 2024-A. Downloaded once per run and shared across all pools.

create_bam.ui:help: If checked, cellranger writes position-sorted BAMs (adds tens of GB per sample). Off by default. Applies to every pool.

cpus.ui:help: localcores per pool. Match to the Batch instance vCPU count.

memory_gb.ui:help: localmem per pool (GB). Match to the Batch instance memory, leaving ~8 GB headroom.

disk_gb.ui:help: Scratch space per pool. Budget ~5x the staged FASTQ size.

form.title: Valinor Cellranger Multi
form.description: Run cellranger multi (GEX + CITE-seq + HTO demux) across one or more pools driven by a samplesheet. One cellranger-multi invocation per run_id. Reference download and form uploads are shared across all pools.

feature_reference.title: Feature Reference CSV
feature_reference.description: 10x feature reference; HTOs as 'Multiplexing Capture', antibodies as 'Antibody Capture'

gex_reference_url.title: GEX Reference URL
gex_reference_url.description: HTTPS URL or s3:// URI to the 10x GEX reference tarball

create_bam.title: Create BAM
create_bam.description: Write position-sorted BAM files (large; off by default)
